titleStmt.title: SII 10.109: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 109. (A.R. No. 646 of 1920.) ON THE NORTHERN FACE OF THE BLACK GRANITE PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF GŌKARṆĒŚVARA, ḌĀVULŪRU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 1063.

summary.p: States that Rājēndra-Chōḍa's servant Kommaya-Nāyaka the headman of Kuṟumgallu in Kaṇḍravāṭi consecrated the image of Gōkēśvara in Ḍāvulūru and built a temple and maṇḍapa for it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¤ rājēṁdracōḍanṛpāla
dyabbairamātyapadavī
rākāmṛgāṁkka Iva
mātyakomma ssa bhāti śaradaṁśa radabhra
kī¨rtiḥ . rāśīkritaṁ kinnuharasya hāsaṁ śa
radghanāghaṁ ghanatāṁggatākiṁ Āhōsvidasyai
va nabhōvitāna mitismata¨rkkaṁjanaya jjanānā
ṁ . Ādau svakāritamahēśvaramaṁdirasya paścā
dacīkara dalaṁkaraṇāya sōyaṁ caṇḍēśamaṇḍa
pa makhaṇḍitacaṇḍatējā rāma¨rtupuṣkaramṛ
gāṁkamitē śakābdē . śrī ḍāvulūri Āyta
manāyakuni koḍuku gommayanāyakuṇḍu
śrī goṁkēśvara dēvaraṁ bratiṣṭiṁcci guḍiyu maṇḍa
paṁbunuṁ gaṭṭiṁcce . Āsī drājēṁdracōḍaḥ para
balamathanō goṁkabhūpālaputrō yatkhaḍgō
tkṛta vidviṭkarinaraturaga prōccaladbhiśsa rōbhiḥ
kaṇṭhē ṣvanyōnyasaktai ratha puruṣamṛgāḥ kēcidā
jau mayūrāḥ kēcidbhūtvā vicitraṁ dvirada nava
danāḥ kēci dujriṁbhayaṁtē . bhūbhūṣaṇō yīva
nikaṁḍravāṭī kuṟuṁgalugrāmavibhu ¨rbbabhūva tasyē
ṣṭabhṛtya ssanṛpālakasya dhīra ssatāmāytama nāya
kō yaḥ . vadhū babhū vāsya viśālakīrtēḥ pativratā
cāravibhūṣitāṁggī satputraratnōjvalatāṁbra
pa¨rṇnī puraṁdarasyēva pulōmaputrī . ¤
madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpā
dapētamanasā bhuvi bhāvibhūpāḥ yē pālaya
ṁtu mama dha¨rmma midaṁ samastaṁ tēṣā mmayā vira
citōṁjali rēṣa mū¨rdhni . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdarāṁ ṣaṣṭhiva¨rṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ¤ Āytāṁbi
kā sadguṇahāralēkhā dayāsamullāsitadṛ
gmayūkhā kavīṁdrakalpakṣitijātaśākhā ma
nōbhavāṁbhōdhi mrigāṁkkalēkhā .
Digital edition of SII 10.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
